_meta.purpose: Camera-free ways to detect that another PERSON or DEVICE (phone, radio, equipment) is nearby. Channels to integrate + visualize on the signals dashboard. Some run on the plain call (acoustic); most need the companion app or a browser with sensor permissions.
_meta.privacy_note: Passive sensing of other people's devices/voices has privacy + legal implications. Justified for lone-worker and disaster safety, but log it, gate it, and prefer presence (not identity). MAC randomization means 'a device is here', not 'whose'.

presence_signals.detects: nearby phones, watches, headsets, BLE-tagged gear
presence_signals.caveat: MAC randomization; iOS limits background; Web Bluetooth Android/Chrome only

presence_signals.detects: nearby APs and devices; FTM ranging
other voices (diarization), equipment running, radio chatter/squelch, alarms, footsteps, doors
powered equipment, motors, mains hum, EM interference from a transmitting radio
footsteps coupled through the floor, running machinery, vehicles

presence_signals.caveat: without SDR, detect a radio only indirectly via its audio + EM signature
